sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106030" key="*turrhni/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τυρρην-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n106030.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">imitate the Tyrrhenians,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῇ φωνῇ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:8:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
